segments.beat: OLED display active on bare PCB, cyan game pixels visible, no shell — internals fully exposed
Same bare-board close-up, display lit, PCB traces and ribbon cable visible
Pull back slightly, board still unhoused, display running game content
Hand enters frame holding the bare PCB, demonstrating pocket scale
Hand holds board closer to camera, display shows game UI text
Extreme close-up of PCB edge and display ribbon — component-level detail visible

selection_note: Bare PCB with live display — strong internals/transparency proof but no shell present; best for maker/hackable angle, not collectible or premium positioning.

aesthetics.standout: functional display shows real UI content
aesthetics.weakness: handheld shake, cluttered PCB background, no controlled lighting - pure maker bench footage
aesthetics.note: bare PCB on a workbench; no shell, no staging
